testcase.name: purchase

testcase.system-out: Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 500.0 ⚠ Amount outside valid range (10.0–100.0). Provided: 500.0. Using safe fallback value. Generated First Name: johnd44 Generated Email: nairobiPalermo163f5@gmail.com purchaseId is not null purchaseId is not empty purchaseId format is valid: 6995557f69e2a855582bdf11 purchaseId length is 24 purchaseId validated successfully: 6995557f69e2a855582bdf11
